title: Tape Measure Kids Toy First DIY Childs Learning Pretend Role Play Educational Toy
features: EDUCATIONAL – This cute toy helps introduce the concepts of length and measurement to your child. With an easy-to-roll vinyl tape showing both inches and centimeters, your child can use this tape to play or help around the house! Kids will learn as they play!

TINY HANDS FRIENDLY – The big and chunky kids tape-measure is easy for little hands to use and maneuver. Features a carry handle so children can take this tool with them from design to project! My First Big Tape Measure has large, easy-to-read numbers and a colorful design. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards.

PRETEND ROLE PLAY – My first tape measure toy will keep your little one entertained for hours. They can measure their room for fun, discover the length of their construction or carpenter project, help dad in the garage, or check how tall their friend or sibling is. No matter what they will measure – it’s education plus lots of fun!

PERFECT GIFT – My Big Tape Measure is an ideal present for little learners. We can guarantee endless fun with this toy. Perfect as a gift for Birthdays, Christmas, or any occasion. Help you discover new learning fun every time you give a gift!
DIMENSIONS – This durable plastic toy measures approx. H:18.5 cm L:14 cm W: 5 cm. It contains Measure up to 36 inches or 100 centimeters.
